acceptance: CMake finds libtorrent-rasterbar, exposes a clear required dependency failure, and defines the build capability in generated config.
verification: BT-on configure without libtorrent-rasterbar failed with the required message; BT-off configure still succeeded.
notes: No optional native BT fallback is allowed.

acceptance: aria2_core links libtorrent consistently across local and release builds.
verification: `cmake -S . -B build/libtorrent-positive -G Ninja -DARIA2_ENABLE_BITTORRENT=ON` configured with `libtorrent-rasterbar=1`; `cmake --build build/libtorrent-positive --target aria2_tests -- -j2` linked `aria2_tests`.
notes: Release dependency closure remains for BTM-010.

acceptance: The project records whether libtorrent requires a global C++ standard bump or a target-local standard change.
verification: A direct compile probe showed libtorrent-rasterbar 2.0.12 headers fail under C++11 and compile under C++14 when Boost headers are available; CMake now uses C++14, requires Boost headers, and links `Boost::headers`.
notes: Global C++14 is the current clean boundary because libtorrent types enter shared core request creation.
